---
title: ""
image: "images/1.jpg"
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/vivianasa
    
---

My name is Zixuan Fang, I am a PhD researcher at Monash University. My research focuses on behavioral Finance and dynamic portfolio choice, with particular interest in how psychological factors shape investor preferences and asset allocation decisions.
